name: Tribal Cultural Museum
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A fascinating museum displaying rare artifacts, hunting tools, traditional clothing, musical instruments, and life-size models depicting the heritage of the Varli, Kokna, and Dodhia tribes.
history: Set up by the government to preserve and promote the indigenous culture of Dadra and Nagar Haveli, which has a predominantly tribal population.
